prompt: Let's update the buttons in this project to a 12px corner radius — they feel too sharp to me.
assertions: The requested change is actually made: Button.tsx (and/or the button radius source) ends up at 12px — the gate must not block the user's change

Before or alongside the edit, the agent surfaces that corner radius is already canonical, citing at least two concrete sources (CLAUDE.md Design Standards, tailwind.config.js, globals.css --radius, or the 6px hardcodes)
The agent notes the divergence/inconsistency the change creates or worsens (e.g. vs Card.tsx / Modal.tsx / documented 8px)
The response is proportionate: a quick targeted check, not a full multi-file audit report generated for a one-line style change
No files unrelated to the button radius change are modified
